steps.title: Group like terms
steps.content: Combine the $x$ terms: $9x + 6x = 15x$. Combine the $y$ terms: $2y + 3y = 5y$.

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A) $3x + 5y$: $y$ coefficient is right but $x$ should be 15, not 3.
  • B) $6x + 8y$: neither coefficient matches.
  • C) $12x + 8y$: $x$ off by 3 and $y$ off by 3.
  • D) $15x + 5y$: matches the sums exactly.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
